home.tagline: Track your products and manage their lifecycle
home.emptyDescription: Scan a product QR code or add products from search to start building your collection.
home.noMatchWithTag: No products match the selected category and tag "{{tag}}".

search.emptyDescription: Find products by name, brand, model, or category
search.noResultsDescription: Try searching with different keywords or clearing the tag filter.

feed.title: Feed
feed.signInTitle: Sign In to See Your Feed
feed.signInDescription: Your personalized product updates and care tips will appear here.
feed.emptyDescription: Add products to your collection or scan QR codes to start seeing updates here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.removeDuplicatesHelp: This will remove duplicate products and scan history entries from your account.
settings.confirmCleanup: Remove duplicate products and scan history? This cannot be undone.
settings.cleanupSuccess: Removed {{instances}} duplicate products and {{scans}} duplicate scans

productDetail.title: Product Details
productDetail.removeDialogDescription: This will remove "{{name}}" from your collection. Your documents and notes for this product will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
productDetail.shareDialogDescription: Anyone with this link can view product details and add it to their collection.

productEdit.notesPlaceholder: Add any notes about this product...
productEdit.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Please use JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or PDF.
productEdit.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
productEdit.saveFirst: Save the product first before attaching documents.

aiChat.title: AI Assistant
aiChat.emptyDescription: Get instant answers about specifications, maintenance, sustainability, and more. Select a question below or type your own.
aiChat.errorMessage: I'm sorry, I encountered an error processing your request. Please try again.
aiChat.inlineError: Failed to get response. Please try again.

aiSettings.title: AI Assistant Settings
aiSettings.heroDescription: Select your preferred AI model and enter your API key to enable intelligent product insights.
aiSettings.configureSubtitle: Enter your API key to enable this assistant
aiSettings.apiKeyHelp: Your API key is stored securely and never shared
aiSettings.successDescription: Your AI assistant is now configured and ready to help
aiSettings.helpTitle: How to Get an API Key
aiSettings.helpChatGPT: ChatGPT: Visit platform.openai.com and create an API key
aiSettings.helpGemini: Gemini: Get your key from Google AI Studio
aiSettings.helpOthers: Others: Visit the respective provider's developer portal

scan.title: QR Scanner
scan.idleDescription: Point your camera at a product QR code to get detailed information and add it to your collection.
scan.positionHint: Position the QR code within the frame
scan.notFoundDescription: The scanned code did not match any known product.
scan.step2: Point your camera at the product QR code
scan.step3: Hold steady until the code is recognized
scan.step4: View product details or add to your collection
scan.saveHistoryFailed: Failed to save to scan history
scan.cameraFallback: Failed to start camera. Please check permissions.

scanHistory.title: Scan History
scanHistory.dialogDescription: This will permanently delete all entries from your scan history. Products already in My Things will not be affected.
scanHistory.emptyDescription: Products you scan will appear here. Start by scanning a QR code.

login.title: Sign In
login.description: Sign in to track your products, get AI-powered answers, and manage your collection.
login.terms: By signing in, you agree to our terms of service.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.line1: Sorry, the page you are looking for doesn't exist.
notFound.line2: It may have been moved or deleted.

userAccount.title: User Account
userAccount.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
userAccount.deleteDialogDesc: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data including your products, scan history, AI conversations, and documents. This action cannot be undone.
userAccount.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
userAccount.privacyBlurb: Your data is stored securely and is only accessible to you. You can export or delete your data at any time.

errorRetry.hint: Please check your connection and try again.

protectedRoute.title: Sign in required
protectedRoute.description: You need to sign in to access this page.

notificationSettings.title: Notifications
notificationSettings.warrantyRemindersDesc: Get notified before your product warranties expire
notificationSettings.careTipsDesc: Receive maintenance tips for your products
notificationSettings.productUpdatesDesc: Get updates about products in your collection
notificationSettings.securityAlertsDesc: Important security notifications about your account
notificationSettings.disclaimer: Notification preferences are saved locally. Push notifications will be available in a future update.

privacySettings.title: Privacy & Security
privacySettings.encryptionDesc: Your API keys and sensitive data are encrypted at rest.
privacySettings.dataAccessDesc: Only you can access your product data, scan history, and AI conversations.
privacySettings.analyticsDesc: Help improve Thap by sharing anonymous usage data
privacySettings.scanHistoryVisibilityDesc: Keep a record of products you scan
privacySettings.exportDataDesc: Download a copy of all your data including products, scan history, and AI conversations.
privacySettings.exportSoon: Data export will be available in a future update
privacySettings.disclaimer: Privacy preferences are saved locally. We never sell your data or share it with third parties.

aiQuestions.univ_001: What are the key features and specifications of this product?
aiQuestions.univ_002: How does this product compare to similar alternatives?
aiQuestions.univ_003: What materials is this product made from and where is it manufactured?

aiQuestions.univ_010: What are the best options for selling or donating this product?

aiQuestions.veh_001: What is the recommended tire pressure for this vehicle?
aiQuestions.veh_002: What is the maintenance schedule for chain or brake service?
